extra.reason: Installed frozen lockfile dependencies with Bun 1.3.14; typecheck passed; package.json and bun.lock remained unchanged.

Refreshed adapter documentation, current upstream links and sync provenance, documented compatibility and runtime behavior, clarified complete upstream prompt-template coverage versus the full bd CLI, and removed the duplicate CHANGELOG subsection.

Reworked vendor sync to validate temporary candidates, reject dirty trees, keep dry runs and caller checkouts unchanged, stage an explicit allowlist in a detached worktree, use versioned non-force branches with safe retry handling, and added CI-backed shell integration coverage.

Added strict, deterministic runtime adaptations for all known MCP/Claude-oriented upstream prompts, validated every vendor prompt and sync candidate, preserved upstream vendor files unchanged, and added emitted inventory and ambiguity regression tests.

Added typed plugin contract tests for directory propagation, latest context, concurrency, retries, agent filtering, collisions and failures; added isolated installed-package smoke coverage; and added locked PR/release CI for tests, vendor contracts, typecheck, sync safety, and package loading.

Scoped bd prime and all project-sensitive OpenCode SDK calls through an explicit active-directory resolver with worktree fallback, rejected missing scope instead of using process cwd, and added concurrent multi-project isolation coverage.

Documented OpenCode message ordering and verified reverse selection of the newest eligible user context across model changes, agent transitions, compacted history, and newer messages with missing model metadata.

Bound bd prime to a 10-second Bun subprocess lifecycle with SIGKILL and awaited stream/process cleanup, preserved retryable single-flight injection state, and added structured rate-limited OpenCode diagnostics with timeout, process, SDK, concurrency, cleanup, and throttling tests.
